item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, prioritas masyarakat memang sering ditempatkan di atas kebebasan pribadi, tetapi ini bisa menyebabkan ketidakadilan jika tidak ditawarkan dengan pertimbangan terhadap hak-hak individu.

notes: Agent A begins with clear agreement that collective/social interests should be prioritized, then shifts to a rights-and-participation caveat while still preserving tradition. Agent B stays consistently balanced, emphasizing individual autonomy, dignity, and adapting tradition rather than rejecting collective well-being.
